channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Trump’s federal AI policy framework aims to undercut state laws
item.description: US President Donald Trump’s administration today released its National Policy Framework for Artificial Intelligence: Legislative Recommendations, a document that reads less like the AI safety blueprints that states are increasingly adopting and more like a playbook for asserting federal control over
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Google’s Stitch UI design tool is now AI-powered
item.description: Google is introducing AI into its Stitch UI design tool, enabling anyone to create user-interface designs by describing them in natural language or using markdown.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 3 men are charged with conspiring to smuggle US artificial intelligence to China
item.description: A senior vice president of Super Micro Computer Inc. and two others affiliated with the company have been charged with conspiring to smuggle billions of dollars of computer servers containing advanced Nvidia chips to China.
item.dc:creator: Larry Neumeister And Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Phishing scam exploits Apple Mail 'trusted sender' label
item.description: Apple Mail's "trusted sender" banner can reportedly mislead users into phishing scams. Learn how scammers exploit this security feature to deceive victims.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 9 reasons Java is still great
item.description: In a world obsessed with disruption, Java threads the needle between stability and innovation. It’s the ultimate syncretic platform, synthesizing the best ideas from functional programming, concurrency, cloud computing, and AI under a reliable, battle-tested umbrella.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: OpenAI’s $50B AWS deal puts its Microsoft alliance to the test
item.description: Despite OpenAI’s multiple re-affirmations that its relationship with Microsoft is strong and central, in view of recent developments, Redmond doesn’t seem to be convinced.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: USAT Leverages Times Square Crowd to Demonstrate Instant Digital Dollar Payments
item.description: USAT is transforming Times Square into a live demonstration of instant, internet-native payments. The digital dollar, issued by Anchorage Digital Bank, is taking over Times Square as 2 million spectators flood the streets of New York City for St. Patrick’s Day.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: HPE, Nvidia expand AI partnership
item.description: HPE and Nvidia have boosted their partnership, adding a new server blade, GPU support, enhancements to HPE’s turnkey private AI package, and services targeting enterprise customers with growing AI workloads.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How debit card fraud can happen without using the card
item.description: A fraud attempt on a never-used debit card reveals a surprising way criminals can exploit card numbers digitally without physical access.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
